evidence: "I guess it is a psychological thriller but it seems more like a character portrait."
"I loved this movie, and highly recommend it to anyone."
"The opening scene reduces complex characters to caricatures..."
"...the story heartbreaking but believable for those of us of a certain generation."
"The stories are a little muddier, getting bogged down a little."
"...the story doesn't quite hold the tension that it does in the book..."
"...the acting is superb and you feel as if you are actually watching a documentary."
"I think Giovanni Ribisi is one of the best actors of his generation..."
"...the fact that the lead is an older, calm person gives this show a credibility that you don't usually find in cop shows."
"...the movie is beautiful in its starkness and the story heartbreaking..."
"...you'll love this movie and want to become a writer when you're done..."
"...the sign of a great movie. Those of us who have had an inexplicable experience will not find the ending that strange..."

summary: The user has a strong preference for psychological thrillers and character-driven dramas, appreciating complex narratives and high production quality. They value emotional resonance and sensory experiences in films, often reflecting on the depth of characters and storytelling.
